本頁整合 Mometasone 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Enerzair Breezhaler is indicated as a maintenance treatment of asthma in adult patients not adequately controlled with a maintenance combination of a long acting beta2 agonist and a high dose of an...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>primary cutaneous T-cell lymphoma（99.4%）</li>
<li>Crohn's colitis（98.8%）</li>
<li>myelodysplastic syndrome（98.3%）</li>
<li>refractory cytopenia of childhood（98.1%）</li>
<li>unclassified myelodysplastic syndrome（97.9%）</li>
<li>partial deletion of the long arm of chromosome 5（97.9%）</li>
<li>cystic teratoma（97.8%）</li>
<li>spinal cord dermoid cyst（97.8%）</li>
<li>aregenerative anemia（97.8%）</li>
<li>disease of orbital part of eye adnexa（97.7%）</li>
<li>severe congenital hypochromic anemia with ringed sideroblasts（97.7%）</li>
<li>renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system-blocker-induced angioedema（97.7%）</li>
<li>dermoid cyst of ovary（97.6%）</li>
<li>disease of orbital region（97.4%）</li>
<li>nephrotic syndrome（97.2%）</li>
<li>granulomatous slack skin disease（97.2%）</li>
<li>Sezary syndrome（97.1%）</li>
<li>primary cutaneous B-cell lymphoma（97.0%）</li>
<li>folliculotropic mycosis fungoides（96.7%）</li>
<li>mycotic corneal ulcer（96.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
